about.title: CORNERSTONE Open Platform
about.subtitle: OPENSOURCE PDK live monitor
about.notes:
Licence free PDK monitoring and management dashboard.
First version designed by Dr. Emre Kaplan (beta release: 01/05/2026).
The portal is open to everyone for further development.

stripped.note: All embedded binaries (GDS, document data URLs, large SVGs, raw CSV / S-matrix bytes) were stripped from this published payload — only metadata remains. Adopters: run a per-BB or per-platform GitHub sync to repopulate the bytes from the original GitHub source.
